name: airtrail-mcp
description: Query and manage your flight history from a self-hosted AirTrail instance.
long_description: Connects Claude to a self-hosted AirTrail flight-tracking instance. List your logged flights, look up flight details, create or update flight entries, delete flights, and export your flight history — all via AirTrail's REST API using a personal API key.

base_url.title: AirTrail instance URL
base_url.description: The base URL of your self-hosted AirTrail instance, e.g. https://airtrail.example.com

api_key.title: API key
api_key.description: API key generated from Settings → Security in your AirTrail instance

aerodatabox_api_key.title: AeroDataBox API key (optional)
aerodatabox_api_key.description: RapidAPI key for AeroDataBox — the same key used in AirTrail's Settings → Integrations, if configured. Enables the lookup_flight and lookup_aircraft tools to enrich flights by flight number before saving.

allow_multi_user_scope.title: Allow querying other users' flights
allow_multi_user_scope.description: Off by default: list_flights and export_flights are restricted to your own flights (scope="mine"). Turn this on only if your API key belongs to an admin/owner and you want Claude to be able to request scope="user"/"all", which exposes other users' flight and seat data.

enable_delete_flight.title: Enable flight deletion
enable_delete_flight.description: Off by default. Turn this on to add a delete_flight tool that lets Claude permanently delete logged flights. This action is irreversible.

allow_insecure_http.title: Allow insecure HTTP
allow_insecure_http.description: Off by default: the AirTrail instance URL must use https://. Turn this on only if your instance is only reachable over plain http:// (e.g. a trusted local network) — your API key will be sent unencrypted.

tools.name: list_flights
tools.description: List logged flights. Restricted to your own flights unless multi-user scope is enabled.

tools.name: get_flight
tools.description: Retrieve full details for a single flight by ID.

tools.name: save_flight
tools.description: Create a new flight, or update an existing one if an id is given.

tools.name: delete_flight
tools.description: Permanently delete a flight by ID. Only available if flight deletion is enabled.

tools.name: export_flights
tools.description: Bulk export logged flights as JSON or YAML. Restricted to your own flights unless multi-user scope is enabled.

tools.name: lookup_flight
tools.description: Look up route/airline/aircraft/timing for a flight number via AeroDataBox.

tools.name: lookup_aircraft
tools.description: Look up an aircraft type ICAO code from its registration via AeroDataBox.
